chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1011 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4212/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. On the last date of hearing i.e. 10-09-2025, the matter was adjourned for today in presence of Counsel for the Petitioner; even then no one has turned up today to pursue the matter diligently. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
